---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem**
<!-- What are you trying to do? What's awkward or impossible today? -->

**Proposed solution**
<!-- Describe the API/CLI surface you'd like, at whatever level of detail you can.
     If it's a new function, sketch the signature. If it's a CLI flag, show the
     invocation. -->

**Alternatives considered**
<!-- Workarounds you've tried, or other designs you weighed. -->

**Additional context**
<!-- Links, screenshots, related issues, or anything else. -->
